mapper.select: SELECT notice_id as noticeId, title, content, target_role_id as targetRoleId, created_at AS createdAt FROM notice WHERE target_role_id = 4 ORDER BY notice_id DESC LIMIT #{beginRow}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice where target_role_id = 4
SELECT subject_id AS subjectId, NAME AS subjectName FROM subject
SELECT name AS subjectName, description FROM subject WHERE name = #{subjectName}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sf.rating_lecture), 1) AS avgRating FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id WHERE sb.name = #{subjectName}

SELECT sf.rating_lecture AS ratingLecture, r.content AS content FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN review r ON sf.satisfaction_id = r.satisfaction_id WHERE sb.name = #{subjectName} ORDER BY r.review_id DESC LIMIT 0, 3

SELECT u.user_id AS parentId, u.name AS parentName, u.phone AS parentPhone, u.address AS parentAddress, u.birth AS parentBirth, t1.user_id AS studentId, t1.name AS studentName, t1.phone AS studentPhone, t1.address AS studentAddress, t1.birth AS studentBirth, t1.email AS studentEmail FROM user u INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON u.user_id = sp.parent_id INNER JOIN user t1 ON sp.student_id = t1.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT v.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, u.name AS studentName, t1.name AS driverName, t1.phone, va.assignment_id, NULL AS payment_id, vc.decided_at, CASE WHEN vc.assignment_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCancelledToday, l.end_time AS endTime FROM student_parent sp INNER JOIN user u ON sp.student_id = u.user_id AND sp.parent_id = #{userId} INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.student_id = u.user_id AND se.status = 'PAID' INNER JOIN lecture l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON va.lecture_id = l.lecture_id LEFT JOIN vehicle v ON va.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT va.assignment_id, va.driver_id, u.name, u.phone FROM vehicle_assignment va INNER JOIN user u ON va.driver_id = u.user_id ) t1 ON t1.assignment_id = va.assignment_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT assignment_id, MAX(decided_at) AS decided_at FROM vehicle_cancel WHERE DATE(decided_at) = CURDATE() GROUP BY assignment_id ) vc ON vc.assignment_id = va.assignment_id LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT st.name AS studentName, sb.name AS subjectName, cl.name AS classroomName, cl.location AS classroomLocation, t.name AS teacherName, lt.day_of_week AS dayOfWeeK, lt.start_time AS startTime, lt.end_time AS endTime, lt.start_date AS startDate, lt.end_date AS endDate FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) pa INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON pa.user_id = sp.parent_id INNER JOIN user st ON sp.student_id = st.user_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.student_id = st.user_id INNER JOIN payment p ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom cl ON lt.classroom_id = cl.classroom_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON ta.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN lt.start_date AND lt.end_date

SELECT ad.attend_date AS attendDate, ad.status FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) pa INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON pa.user_id = sp.parent_id INNER JOIN user st ON sp.student_id = st.user_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.student_id = st.user_id INNER JOIN payment p ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN attendance ad ON ad.payment_id = p.payment_id ORDER BY attendDate DESC

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, s.name AS subjectName, u.name AS teacherName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.end_time AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, c.location, c.name AS classroomName, l.amount, l.recruited, IFNULL(e.current_count, 0) AS currentCount, CONCAT(IFNULL(e.current_count, 0), '/', l.recruited) AS status FROM lecture l INNER JOIN subject s ON l.subject_id = s.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom c ON l.classroom_id = c.classroom_id LEFT JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON l.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id LEFT JOIN user u ON ta.teacher_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT lecture_id, COUNT(*) AS current_count FROM student_enrollment WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'PAID') GROUP BY lecture_id ) e ON l.lecture_id = e.lecture_id WHERE CURDATE() <= DATE_SUB(l.start_date, INTERVAL 3 DAY)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM album
WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_enrollment(student_id, lecture_id, STATUS, enrolled_at) VALUES(#{studentId}, #{lectureId}, 'PENDING', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_enrollment se JOIN lecture l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id WHERE se.student_id = #{studentId} AND se.status != 'CANCEL' AND (l.start_date <= #{newEndDate} AND l.end_date >= #{newStartDate})
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate FROM lecture WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}
SELECT qna_id AS qnaId, parent_id AS parentId, question, answer, created_at AS createdAt FROM qna ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{beginRow}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna
mapper.update: update qna set question = #{question} where qna_id = #{qnaId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.payment_id AS paymentId, va.assignment_id AS assignmentId FROM user parent JOIN student_parent sp ON parent.user_id = sp.parent_id JOIN user student ON sp.student_id = student.user_id JOIN student_enrollment se ON student.user_id = se.student_id JOIN payment p ON se.enrollment_id = p.enrollment_id JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON se.lecture_id = va.lecture_id WHERE parent.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle_cancel (payment_id, assignment_id, cancel_reason) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{assignmentId}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT u.name AS studentName, sb.name AS subjectName, lt.start_date AS startDate, lt.end_date AS endDate, lt.start_time AS startTime, lt.end_time AS endTime, lt.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, se.enrolled_at AS enrollmentAt, se.student_id AS StudentId, lt.lecture_id AS lectureId, se.status, lt.amount FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) p INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON p.user_id = sp.parent_id INNER JOIN user u ON sp.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON sp.student_id = se.student_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id WHERE se.status = 'PAID'

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, s.name AS subjectName, u.name AS teacherName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.end_time AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, c.location, l.amount, se.student_id AS studentId, c.name AS classroomName, stu.name AS studentName, se.enrolled_at AS enrollmentAt, se.status AS status FROM student_enrollment se INNER JOIN lecture l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON l.subject_id = s.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom c ON l.classroom_id = c.classroom_id LEFT JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON l.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id LEFT JOIN user u ON ta.teacher_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON se.student_id = sp.student_id INNER JOIN user stu ON se.student_id = stu.user_id WHERE se.status IN ('PENDING', 'CANCEL', 'REFUND', 'PAID', 'REFUNDWAIT') AND sp.parent_id = #{userId}
SELECT name AS userName, user_id AS userId FROM user WHERE role_id = 3

SELECT u.name AS teacherName, th.last_education AS lastEducation, th.personal_history AS personalHistory FROM user u INNER JOIN teacher_history th ON u.user_id = th.teacher_id WHERE u.user_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sf.rating_teacher), 1) AS ratingTeacher FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT sf.rating_teacher AS ratingTeacher, r.content AS content FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN review r ON sf.satisfaction_id = r.satisfaction_id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY r.review_id DESC LIMIT 0, 3

SELECT ad.attend_date AS attendDate, ad.status AS status, sb.name AS subjectName, t.name AS teacherName FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{studentId}) u INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN payment p ON se.enrollment_id = p.enrollment_id INNER JOIN attendance ad ON p.payment_id = ad.payment_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON l.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON l.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM album
WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')

SELECT ab.album_id AS albumId, ab.lecture_id AS lectureId, sb.name AS subjectName, ab.title AS title, ab.description, DATE_FORMAT(ab.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM album ab LEFT OUTER JOIN lecture lt ON lt.lecture_id = ab.lecture_id LEFT OUTER JOIN subject sb ON sb.subject_id = lt.subject_id WHERE ab.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') LIMIT #{beginRow}, #{size}

SELECT ab.album_id AS albumId, ab.lecture_id AS lectureId, sb.name AS subjectName, ab.title AS title, ab.description, DATE_FORMAT(ab.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM (SELECT * FROM album WHERE album_id = #{albumId}) ab INNER JOIN lecture lt ON lt.lecture_id = ab.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON sb.subject_id = lt.subject_id
SELECT photo_id AS photoId, album_id AS albumId, file_path AS filePath FROM album_photo WHERE album_id = #{albumId}
mapper.update: UPDATE student_enrollment SET status = 'CANCEL' WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND enrolled_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL 3 DAY
